expr: (async () => { const db = await import('/assets/js/store.js'); const docs = await db.all('documents'); const biz = await db.all('businesses'); return { numbers: docs.map(d => d.number).sort(), seqNext: biz[0].sequences.invoice.next, rows: [...document.querySelectorAll('#docs-body .doc-number')].map(e => e.textContent.trim()) }; })()
